name: use-browser-priview
description: Standalone browser preview project for Finder and editor context menus.

scripts.check:vscode-adapter: node --check adapters/vscode/extension.js && node --check adapters/vscode/open-finder-preview.js && bash -n adapters/vscode/open-finder-preview.sh && bash -n adapters/vscode/install-macos-finder-quick-action.sh
scripts.check:codex-app: node --check adapters/codex-app/patch-codex-open-with.js && bash -n adapters/codex-app/open-codex-preview.sh && bash -n adapters/codex-app/install-codex-app.sh && bash -n adapters/codex-app/uninstall-codex-app.sh
scripts.check:installers: bash -n install.sh && bash -n install.command && bash -n install-vscode.command && bash -n install-finder.command && bash -n install-codex-app.command
scripts.test: npm run check:vscode-adapter && npm run check:codex-app && npm run check:installers && npm run test:vscode-adapter-contract && npm run test:shared-session-store && npm run test:finder-shared-session-reuse && npm run test:install-flows && npm run test:codex-app-patch
